---
title: "Recently Read"
date: 2026-03-28
categories:
  - Automated Updates
  - Books
draft: false
---

![](https://i.gr-assets.com/images/S/compressed.photo.goodreads.com/books/1518344922l/38292111._SX98_.jpg){width=150px}

## Dollars and Democracy
*Dollars and Democracy (Classic Reprint)*

**Philip Burne-Jones**

Rating: ★★★★★

<br/>

![](https://i.gr-assets.com/images/S/compressed.photo.goodreads.com/books/1702557732l/203790675._SX98_.jpg){width=150px}

## The war in the United States: Report to the Swiss Military Department : Preceded by a Discourse to the Federal Military Society Assembled at Berne, Aug. 18, 1862
**Ferdinand Lecomte**

Rating: ★★★★★

<br/>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*This post was automatically generated from [my Goodreads shelf](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/98547221-connor-hanan?shelf=read).*

-CH
